<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band14_chunk002.pdf#page=5 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band14 p58 -->

<!-- header: INGOLSTADT KONGREGATIONSSAAI -->

<!-- header: INGOLSTADT KONGREGATIONSSAAL -->


[[File:Band14_chunk002_p005_img001.jpg|thumb|B Die Menschwerdung Christi als Heil der Menschheit, Westhälfte (C.D. Asam 1735)]]



[[File:Band14_chunk002_p005_img002.jpg|thumb]]



----
~ < (
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band14 p59 -->
